title: Basic Questions (WH Questions)
description: Learn WH question words (what, where, when, who, how) and use them in real hotel situations. Ask for information confidently!
descriptionTr: WH soru kelimelerini (what, where, when, who, how) öğren ve gerçek otel durumlarında kullan. Güvenle bilgi sor!

vocabulary.example: My room is on the third floor.
vocabulary.extra: Can I see the room before I decide?
vocabulary.extraTr: Karar vermeden önce odayı görebilir miyim?

vocabulary.example: Here is your room key. Don't lose it!
vocabulary.extra: I left my key inside the room. Can you help me?
vocabulary.extraTr: Anahtarımı odanın içinde unuttum. Yardımcı olabilir misiniz?

vocabulary.example: What floor is my room on?
vocabulary.extra: The restaurant is on the ground floor.

vocabulary.example: Where is the elevator? I have heavy luggage.
vocabulary.extra: Take the elevator to the fifth floor.

vocabulary.example: What time is breakfast?
vocabulary.extra: Breakfast is included in the price.

vocabulary.example: What is the wifi password?
vocabulary.extra: The wifi is free for all guests.

vocabulary.example: Can I see your passport, please?
vocabulary.extra: I always keep my passport in a safe place.
vocabulary.extraTr: Pasaportumu her zaman güvenli bir yerde tutarım.

vocabulary.example: I have a reservation under the name Eyüp.
vocabulary.extra: Do you have a reservation, sir?

vocabulary.example: How many nights are you staying?
vocabulary.extra: I want to stay for three nights.

vocabulary.example: How much is the price per night?
vocabulary.extra: The price includes breakfast and wifi.

vocabulary.example: What time is check-in?
vocabulary.extra: Check-in starts at 2 PM.

vocabulary.example: When is check-out time?
vocabulary.extra: Check-out is at 11 AM. Please don't be late.

vocabulary.example: I'd like a single room, please.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Tek kişilik bir oda istiyorum, lütfen.
vocabulary.extra: A single room is cheaper than a double.
vocabulary.extraTr: Tek kişilik oda çift kişilikten daha ucuz.

vocabulary.example: Do you have a double room available?
vocabulary.exampleTr: Çift kişilik müsait odanız var mı?
vocabulary.extra: The double room has a big bed and a nice view.
vocabulary.extraTr: Çift kişilik odanın büyük yatağı ve güzel manzarası var.

vocabulary.example: I'll wait for you in the lobby.
vocabulary.extra: The lobby is very modern and clean.

vocabulary.example: Please go to reception for your key.
vocabulary.extra: The reception is open 24 hours.

vocabulary.example: Where can I leave my suitcase?
vocabulary.extra: My suitcase is very heavy. I need help!
vocabulary.extraTr: Bavulum çok ağır. Yardıma ihtiyacım var!

vocabulary.example: How many pieces of luggage do you have?
vocabulary.extra: You can leave your luggage at reception.

vocabulary.example: Can I get extra towels, please?
vocabulary.extra: The towels are in the bathroom.

vocabulary.example: The room has a beautiful sea view.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Odanın güzel bir deniz manzarası var.
vocabulary.extra: Which room has the best view?

vocabulary.example: Is this room available for tonight?
vocabulary.exampleTr: Bu oda bu gece için müsait mi?
vocabulary.extra: Sorry, no rooms are available this weekend.
vocabulary.extraTr: Üzgünüm, bu hafta sonu müsait oda yok.

vocabulary.example: I want to book a room for two nights.
vocabulary.exampleTr: İki gecelik bir oda rezerve etmek istiyorum.
vocabulary.extra: Where can I book a hotel online?

vocabulary.example: Can you confirm my reservation, please?
vocabulary.extra: I need to confirm the dates with my boss.

vocabulary.example: I need to cancel my reservation.
vocabulary.extra: Can I cancel without a fee?

vocabulary.example: Please sign here at the bottom.
vocabulary.extra: Where do I sign this form?

vocabulary.example: Please fill out this registration form.
vocabulary.extra: How do I fill out this part? I don't understand.

vocabulary.example: What is the hotel's address?
vocabulary.extra: Please write your home address on the form.

vocabulary.example: I want a quiet room, please. I need to sleep well.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Sessiz bir oda istiyorum, lütfen. İyi uyumam lazım.
vocabulary.extra: The hotel is in a very quiet area.

vocabulary.example: The bed is very comfortable.
vocabulary.extra: Is the room comfortable enough for you?
vocabulary.extraTr: Oda sizin için yeterince rahat mı?

vocabulary.example: The room service is available until midnight.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Oda servisi gece yarısına kadar mevcut.
vocabulary.extra: How is the service at this hotel?

grammar.title: WH Questions — What, Where, When, Who, How, How much, How many, Which
grammar.titleTr: WH Soruları — What, Where, When, Who, How, How much, How many, Which
grammar.explanation: WH questions start with a question word. The structure is: WH word + auxiliary verb (do/does/is/are) + subject + main verb. These questions need a full answer, not just yes/no.
grammar.explanationTr: WH soruları bir soru kelimesiyle başlar. Yapı: WH kelimesi + yardımcı fiil (do/does/is/are) + özne + ana fiil. Bu sorulara tam cevap verilir, sadece evet/hayır değil.
table: What time is breakfast? — Kahvaltı saat kaçta?
When do you arrive? — Ne zaman varıyorsun?
The manager is at the reception.
Who is your teacher? — Öğretmenin kim?
How do you spell your name? — Adını nasıl yazıyorsun?
How much does it cost? — Ne kadar tutar?
How many → Kaç tane? (sayılabilir şeyler için)
How many bags do you have? — Kaç çantan var?

tips.en: What = things/info, Where = places, When = time, Who = people
tips.tr: What = şey/bilgi, Where = yerler, When = zaman, Who = kişiler

tips.en: How much = price or uncountable. How many = countable things.
tips.tr: How much = fiyat veya sayılamayan. How many = sayılabilen şeyler.

tips.en: Which = choosing from options. 'Which room do you prefer?'
tips.tr: Which = seçenekler arasından seçmek. 'Hangi odayı tercih edersiniz?'

tips.en: WH questions need a full answer, not just Yes/No.
tips.tr: WH sorularına tam cevap verilir, sadece Evet/Hayır olmaz.

tips.en: Word order: WH + do/does/is/are + subject + verb
tips.tr: Kelime sırası: WH + do/does/is/are + özne + fiil

tips.en: How + adjective: How old are you? How long is the trip?
tips.tr: How + sıfat: How old are you? (Kaç yaşındasın?) How long is the trip? (Yolculuk ne kadar sürer?)

reading.text:
Last month, I stayed at the Grand Star Hotel in Antalya for three nights. It was my first business trip, so I was a little nervous.

The hotel is in a quiet area near the beach. When I arrived, the receptionist was very friendly. She asked, 'How many nights are you staying?' and 'Do you have a reservation?' Everything was fast and easy.

My room was on the fifth floor. It was a single room with a nice sea view. The bed was very comfortable and the bathroom was clean. There were fresh towels every day.

Breakfast was included in the price. The restaurant was on the ground floor and it opened at 7 AM. The food was great — eggs, cheese, bread, fruit, and Turkish tea.

The wifi was free but a little slow. I asked, 'What is the wifi password?' and they gave me a card with the information.

The only problem was the elevator. It was very slow and sometimes I waited five minutes! But the staff was helpful and the service was excellent. The price was 800 TL per night, which is good for Antalya.

I definitely want to go back. I give this hotel 4 out of 5 stars!
reading.textTr:
Geçen ay Antalya'daki Grand Star Otel'de üç gece kaldım. İlk iş seyahatimdi, bu yüzden biraz gergindim.

Otel sahile yakın sakin bir bölgede. Vardığımda resepsiyonist çok güler yüzlüydü. 'Kaç gece kalacaksınız?' ve 'Rezervasyonunuz var mı?' diye sordu. Her şey hızlı ve kolaydı.

Odam beşinci kattaydı. Güzel deniz manzaralı tek kişilik bir odaydı. Yatak çok rahattı ve banyo temizdi. Her gün temiz havlular vardı.

Kahvaltı fiyata dahildi. Restoran zemin kattaydı ve sabah 7'de açılıyordu. Yemekler harikaydı — yumurta, peynir, ekmek, meyve ve Türk çayı.

Wifi ücretsizdi ama biraz yavaştı. 'Wifi şifresi ne?' diye sordum ve bilgiyle birlikte bir kart verdiler.

Tek sorun asansördü. Çok yavaştı ve bazen beş dakika bekledim! Ama personel yardımseverdi ve hizmet mükemmeldi. Gecelik fiyat 800 TL'ydi, Antalya için iyi.

Kesinlikle tekrar gitmek istiyorum. Bu otele 5 üzerinden 4 yıldız veriyorum!

questions.question: How many nights did the writer stay at the hotel?
What floor was the room on?
What was the problem at the hotel?
How much was the room per night?
What rating did the writer give the hotel?

fillBlanks.sentence: ___ much is the room per night?
___ room do you prefer — single or double?
I have a ___ under the name Eyüp.
The room has a beautiful sea ___.
The bed is very ___. I slept well!

multipleChoice.question: "___ is the wifi password?" Doğru soru kelimesi hangisi?
"___ is your room?" (Odanız hangi katta?) Doğru kelime?
"___ do you spell your name?" Doğru kelime?
"___ bag do you want — the black or the brown?"

sentenceOrder.correct: I have a reservation for tonight
Can I get extra towels please
How many nights are you staying
Which room has a sea view

translation.english: What floor is your room on?
How much is the room per night?
acceptAlso: How much is the room a night
How much does the room cost per night

translation.english: How many nights are you staying?
acceptAlso: How many nights will you stay
How many nights do you stay

dialog.title: Checking Into a Hotel
dialog.context: Eyüp iş seyahati için Antalya'daki bir otele giriş yapıyor. Resepsiyonistle konuşuyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good evening! Welcome to the Grand Star Hotel. How can I help you?
lines.textTr: İyi akşamlar! Grand Star Otel'e hoş geldiniz. Size nasıl yardımcı olabilirim?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Good evening! I have a reservation. My name is Eyüp.
lines.textTr: İyi akşamlar! Rezervasyonum var. Adım Eyüp.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Let me check. How do you spell your last name, please?
lines.textTr: Bir bakayım. Soyadınızı nasıl yazıyorsunuz, lütfen?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Found it! A single room for three nights. Is that correct?
lines.textTr: Buldum! Üç gecelik tek kişilik oda. Doğru mu?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, that's right. How much is the room per night?
lines.textTr: Evet, doğru. Oda geceliği ne kadar?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: It's 800 TL per night and breakfast is included. Can I see your passport, please?
lines.textTr: Geceliği 800 TL ve kahvaltı dahil. Pasaportunuzu görebilir miyim, lütfen?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Here you go. What floor is my room on?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Your room is on the fifth floor, room 512. It has a sea view! Please fill out this form and sign at the bottom.
lines.textTr: Odanız beşinci katta, 512 numara. Deniz manzarası var! Lütfen bu formu doldurun ve altta imzalayın.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Great, thank you! Where is the elevator? And what is the wifi password?
lines.textTr: Harika, teşekkürler! Asansör nerede? Ve wifi şifresi ne?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: The elevator is on your left, next to the lobby. The wifi password is on this card. What time do you want breakfast? It starts at 7 AM.
lines.textTr: Asansör sol tarafınızda, lobinin yanında. Wifi şifresi bu kartta. Kahvaltıyı saat kaçta istersiniz? Sabah 7'de başlıyor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I'll come at 8 AM. When is check-out time?
lines.textTr: Sabah 8'de gelirim. Çıkış saati ne zaman?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Check-out is at 11 AM. Here is your room key. Enjoy your stay, Mr. Cebekci!
lines.textTr: Çıkış saati 11:00. İşte oda anahtarınız. İyi tatiller, Bay Cebekci!

questions.question: How many nights is Eyüp staying?
How much is the room per night?
What floor is Eyüp's room on?
